info.title: cotopaxi
info.description: A toolset for deploying data to Azure Cosmos DB as part of a cloud-native application, designed for straightforward integration with CI/CD pipelines.

hookCapture.patchTarget: Parse-postfix (OK: Command.Parse, OK: Command.Parse, OK: CommandLineParser.Parse, OK: CommandLineParser.Parse, OK: ParseResult.Invoke, OK: ParseErrorAction.Invoke, OK: HelpAction.Invoke, OK: ParseResult.InvokeAsync, OK: RootCommand.ctor(String))

x-inspectra.cliParsedDescription: The package manager for Azure Cosmos DB

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help and usage information

options.name: --version
options.description: Show version information

commands.name: pack
commands.description: Packs the deployment entries into a database package

options.name: --version
options.description: Sets the package version information

arguments.name: project
arguments.description: The path to the project that specifies deployment entries to include

arguments.name: package
arguments.description: The path to a resulting database package

commands.name: deploy
commands.description: Deploys the database packages to the Azure Cosmos DB account

options.name: --endpoint
options.description: The address of the Azure Cosmos DB account

options.name: --key
options.description: The account key or resource token for the Azure Cosmos DB account

options.name: --connection-string
options.description: The connection string for the Azure Cosmos DB account

options.name: --profile
options.description: The path to the deployment profile or profiles that specify documents eligible for updates

options.name: --dry-run
options.description: Show which operations would be executed instead of actually executing them [default: False]

arguments.name: package
arguments.description: The path to the database package or packages to deploy to the Azure Cosmos DB account

commands.name: checkpoint
commands.description: Creates a database package with rollback operations

options.name: --endpoint
options.description: The address of the Azure Cosmos DB account

options.name: --key
options.description: The account key or resource token for the Azure Cosmos DB account

options.name: --connection-string
options.description: The connection string for the Azure Cosmos DB account

arguments.name: package
arguments.description: The path to the database package or packages for deployment to the Azure Cosmos DB account

arguments.name: rollback-package
arguments.description: The path to a resulting database package with rollback operations

commands.name: snapshot
commands.description: Creates a database package from the Azure Cosmos DB account

options.name: --endpoint
options.description: The address of the Azure Cosmos DB account

options.name: --key
options.description: The account key or resource token for the Azure Cosmos DB account

options.name: --connection-string
options.description: The connection string for the Azure Cosmos DB account

arguments.name: profile
arguments.description: The path to the deployment profile or profiles that specify which documents to take snapshots of

arguments.name: package
arguments.description: The path to a resulting database package with import operations

commands.name: diff
commands.description: Shows differences between database packages or between a database package and a database

options.name: --endpoint
options.description: The address of the Azure Cosmos DB account

options.name: --key
options.description: The account key or resource token for the Azure Cosmos DB account

options.name: --connection-string
options.description: The connection string for the Azure Cosmos DB account

options.name: --diff-filter
options.description: The filter expression to show only specified difference types

options.name: --profile
options.description: The path to the deployment profile to generate based on new and modified documents

options.name: --exit-code
options.description: Instruct the program to exit with 1 if there were differences and 0 otherwise [default: False]

arguments.name: package1
arguments.description: The path to the database package to compare

arguments.name: package2
arguments.description: The path to the database package to compare with (if not specified, the database is used)

commands.name: show
commands.description: Shows information about a database package

arguments.name: package
arguments.description: The path to the database package to show information about

commands.name: format
commands.description: Formats and prunes the sources with deployment entries

arguments.name: source
arguments.description: The path to a source or sources with deployment entries to format and prune
